name: kitp-web
description: kitp web client — zero-framework, signal/control, esbuild-only.

comments.toolchain: esbuild is the SOLE build/dev dependency. No Svelte, Vite, Tailwind, React, vitest, or jest. Type-checking is via `tsc --noEmit` (typescript provided ambiently / by editor) as the type oracle; esbuild does emit only.
comments.runtime-deps: dompurify + marked are the markdown/XSS boundary and are VENDORED under web/vendor/ as ESM when the Markdown control lands (next pass) — not installed via this toolchain.
comments.tests: node --test runs test/*.test.mjs (esbuild-built on the fly). Dependency-light: no test framework.
